top_signals.title: Gold Rises on Dip-Buying as Traders Weigh Middle East Clashes
top_signals.summary: Gold rose on dip-buying as traders monitored developments in the Middle East for clues on the energy price impact on inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Climbing interest rates reshape Japan’s corporate bond market
top_signals.summary: While higher rates have raised borrowing costs for issuers, they have also incentivized investors toward fixed-income securities, setting in motion a new cycle of capital flows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Thousands welcome home Argentina squad, without Messi, after World Cup loss
top_signals.summary: It was not the homecoming Argentines had hoped for, four years after millions celebrated their team's tournament victory in 2022.
